scripts.start: npm run build:web && mvn -s .mvn/settings.xml -f backend/pom.xml -DskipTests compile -q && mvn -s .mvn/settings.xml -f backend/pom.xml dependency:build-classpath -Dmdep.outputFile=target/cp.txt -q && node scripts/run-backend.js
scripts.dev: npm run build:web && mvn -s .mvn/settings.xml -f backend/pom.xml -DskipTests compile -q && mvn -s .mvn/settings.xml -f backend/pom.xml dependency:build-classpath -Dmdep.outputFile=target/cp.txt -q && node scripts/run-backend.js
scripts.backend:build: mvn -s .mvn/settings.xml -f backend/pom.xml -DskipTests compile && mvn -s .mvn/settings.xml -f backend/pom.xml dependency:build-classpath -Dmdep.outputFile=target/cp.txt
scripts.predeploy: npm run build:web && npm run verify:build
